title: Colorful Diamonds Mod
description: Adds 16 new colored diamonds as well as their blocks, armor, and tools!
body:
Colorful Diamonds Mod lets you color your diamonds with any of the 16 dyes in Minecraft.

You can craft blocks, armor, and tools with dyed diamonds.

You can use armor of different colors to assign specific uses, such as red for fire resistance, blue for exploration, or maybe orange for blast protection.

You can also just have a set of armor of different colors to suit your style!

Use new block colors as decorations in your builds.

The only limit is your imagination!

## Additional Links
- [Curse Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/colorful-diamonds-mod)
